# G2 Pass Fixture

## Risks

### Known Risks

| Risk | Probability | Impact | Mitigation |
|------|-------------|--------|------------|
| Schedule slip | High | Medium | Weekly tracking |

### Gray Rhinos

| Gray Rhino | Denial Reason | Counter |
|------------|---------------|---------|
| Regulatory change | Teams assume status quo persists | Monitor policy channels |

### Black Swans

| Black Swan | Survival Plan |
|------------|---------------|
| Key vendor ceases operations | Dual-source contracts; contingency budget |
